response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video as a performance from 'Secret Society holoX Live 2026 First MISSION'. 2. Identified the vocal track as an electronic remix of '常夜リペイント' (Tokoyami Repaint) by holoX using web search. 3. Used the search tool to find the full lyrics for '常夜リペイント' in Japanese. 4. Structured the JSON by defining scenes based on camera changes and attributing the full lyrics to the vocal musical performance.
response.global_summary: A high-energy performance segment from the 'Secret Society holoX Live 2026 First MISSION' concert. A DJ, wearing a hooded robe with a cross emblem, mixes an electronic remix of the song '常夜リペイント' (Tokoyami Repaint) while the crowd at the Pia Arena MM enthusiastically cheers and waves glow sticks.

scenes.description: The video opens with a DJ in a hooded robe mixing at a Pioneer DJ console in a dark studio. The screen behind the DJ shows concert footage of the 'holoX' performance with a massive crowd waving glow sticks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"Kneel before us!"
"We are slashing through the disposable reality"
"Slicing it in one strike!"
"Children lost in the endless samsara"
"Let us lure you with our jet-black wings"
"We are the rulers of the stars of Eden, Secret Society..."
"holoX!!"

Woah-oh Woah-oh-oh Oh-oh-oh
How Low? This world is hopeless (What do you want?)
Black Out The bell signaling the end is ringing
Ra-pa-pa-pa-ra Let's dance together
Let's take a trip
Introverts and extroverts too, Sing a Song
Everything is just about feeling good
Falling down into the bottom of the darkness
Sweet, sweet melody, here you go, here you go, towards where the hands are clapping
Already can't escape, look, once you're stained in darkness
Repaint the world, if you wish for it, we'll give it to you, everything
Break the common sense, spin around and go crazy, light the fire
(Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)
Devour everything
(Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)
We will teach you the secret
Woah-oh Woah-oh-oh Oh-oh-oh
Charisma of evil, leading the commoners
We don't know about justice

Earnestly not serious, the passing ritual of our company
Seek your wishes, grant your desires, world conquest
Let's sing Ra-pa-pa, let's Swing together
Bye Bye Bye to the boring world
We will show you a dream that never ends
Here, go to sleep
More, more, deeper
Here, go ahead, go ahead, you want to go, right?
Already can't stop, look, once you're stained in evil
Repaint the world, we'll give you what you want, everything
Rewrite the rules, spin it all around
Burn it down
(Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)
Towards all the imposters
(Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)
We will teach you the secret

(Laplus! Laplus!!)
"Everyone, one last time!"
(holoX! holoX!!)
"holoX, holding the world in our hands! holoX, changing the world! holoX, with the world in our hands!"

Release your heart
Here, go ahead, go ahead, surrender yourself

scenes.description: The camera cuts to the concert audience, packed in the arena, holding and waving penlights in various colors as the song continues.
Close-up shots of enthusiastic fans holding up fan signs featuring holoX characters and waving their glow sticks to the beat of the remix.
